titleEn: New ARA 595 Sprayer Brings AI-Powered Precision to Irrigated Crops in the Western U.S.
titleZh: ARA 595喷雾机：AI精准植保技术登陆美国西部灌溉农田
summaryZh: 瑞士Ecorobotix公司在美国推出ARA 595超精准喷雾机，专为加州和亚利桑那州80英寸灌溉床设计，搭载Plant-by-Plant AI™技术，可减少高达95%的投入成本。该设备工作宽度19.7英尺，速度4.5英里/小时，每小时覆盖10英亩，支持2.4×2.4英寸点喷，安全使用非选择性除草剂，并兼容30多种作物算法及生菜间苗功能，为西南部农场带来精准农业新水平。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了AI与精准植保技术在灌溉农田中的前沿应用，虽主要针对大田作物，但其Plant-by-Plant AI™和超精准点喷理念对智慧畜牧中的精准饲喂、环境控制等场景具有重要借鉴价值。
contentFull: By AgPR Share Ecorobotix, a Swiss company specializing in AI-driven agricultural technology, launches the ARA595 Ultra-High Precision (UHP) Sprayer in the United States. Designed for 80-inch irrigation beds with side sprinklers commonly used in California and Arizona, the ARA595 will be manufactured in Lyons, Kansas and available to ship by the end of July. Powered by Ecorobotix’s Plant-by-Plant AI™, The ARA595 applies crop protection products only where needed, reducing input cost up to 95%. Built for farms using ground-level irrigation systems, the machine features specially designed pipe guides that help navigate side-sprinkler infrastructure during operation, bringing a new level of precision agriculture to farmers across Southwestern United States. The ARA595 features a working width of 19.7 feet and driving speed of up to 4.5 mph, covering up to 10 acres per hour. The ultra precise 2.4 x 2.4-inch spot spray enables operations to safely use non-selective herbicides without damaging crops. The system also supports over 30 crop algorithms (see list of crops) and capabilities such as lettuce thinning and adjustable safety zones. By combining advanced technology with field-ready design, the ARA595 represents Ecorobotix’s continued commitment to bring sustainable and practical AI-powered precision agriculture solutions to farmers worldwide. translationZh:
瑞士Ecorobotix公司是一家专注于人工智能驱动农业技术的企业，近日在美国推出了ARA 595超精准喷雾机。该设备专为加州和亚利桑那州常见的80英寸灌溉床（配备侧喷灌系统）设计，将在堪萨斯州莱昂斯市制造，并于7月底前开始发货。

ARA 595搭载Ecorobotix的Plant-by-Plant AI™技术，仅在需要的地方施用植保产品，投入成本最高可降低95%。该机器专为使用地面灌溉系统的农场打造，配备了特殊设计的管道导向装置，可在作业中轻松绕过侧喷灌基础设施，为美国西南部农民带来全新水平的精准农业。

ARA 595的工作宽度为19.7英尺，行驶速度最高可达4.5英里/小时，每小时可覆盖10英亩。其超精准的2.4×2.4英寸点喷功能，使操作人员能够安全使用非选择性除草剂而不损伤作物。该系统还支持30多种作物算法（参见作物列表），并具备生菜间苗、可调节安全区等能力。

通过将先进技术与田间适用设计相结合，ARA 595体现了Ecorobotix持续致力于为全球农民提供可持续且实用的AI驱动精准农业解决方案的承诺。
author: Matt Hopkins
contentHtml:
Powered by Ecorobotix’s Plant-by-Plant AI, the ARA595 applies crop protection products only where needed, reducing input cost up to 95%.
The post New ARA 595 Sprayer Brings AI-Powered Precision to Irrigated Crops in the Western U.S. appeared first on Global Ag Tech Initiative.
